import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
    mut total = 0
    for t in toks
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        if n > 0
          total = total + n * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    println("result=#{total}")
  when None
    println("result=0")
  end
end
